messages.content: Hello! How may I assist you today?

Write a song, a first single, for a drag queen Humanitina. Humanitina is a drag queen from Guadalajara, Jalisco, Mexico, and was one of competitors on the first season of Drag Race Mexico. Write the first verse and a chorus.

Verse 1:
Out of the barrio, she came with a twist
Gave us all life with a flick of her wrist
From Jalisco, she represented with pride
Humanitina, the fire inside

Chorus:
She's the queen of the night, the one to behold
A talent and beauty that never grows old
Humanitina, the heart of the show
Here to slay, let the good times flow.

Verse 1:
Iz barrio-a stize ona, andjeo u telu
S nama zivot ubacuje u petu brzinu
Iz Jalisco-a dolazi s ponosom u grudima
Humanitina, plamen koji u nama gori

Chorus:
Vlada nocu kao prava kraljica
Svestranost i lepota ceo svet osvajaju
Humanitina, dusevni dodatak svakom dogadjaju
Tu je da pobije sve, neka slavlje krene.
rewrite that but in Serbian in cyrillic alphabet

Строфа 1:
Из баррио-а стизе она, анђео у телу
С нама живот убацује у пету брзину
Из Јалиско-а долази с поносом у грудима
Humanitina, пламен који у нама гори

Хорус:
Влада ноћу као права краљица
Свестраност и лепота цео свет освајају
Humanitina, душевни додатак сваком догађају
Ту је да побије све, нека славље крене.

Strofa 1:
Iz barrio-a stize ona, anđeo u telu
S nama život ubacuje u petu brzinu
Iz Jalisco-a dolazi s ponosom u grudima
Humanitina, plamen koji u nama gori

Horus:
Vlada nocu kao prava kraljica
Svestranost i lepota ceo svet osvajaju
Humanitina, dusevni dodatak svakom dogadjaju
Tu je da pobije sve, neka slavlje krene.
write lyrics to Rupaul - Cover Girl

Verse 1:
I see them staring back at me,
And I can see the fear we share.
I hear them calling out for me,
But I can't go, I won't be there.

Pre-Chorus:
I take a step, then fall apart,
Can't find the strength to play the part.
I close my eyes, but I can see,
The person that I'm meant to be.

Chorus:
Cover girl, put the bass in your walk,
Head to toe, let your whole body talk.
Cover girl, put your face in the place,
Beat your mug, let's show the world your face.

Verse 2:
I feel the beat inside my soul,
But something always gets in the way.
I see the world spinning 'round,
But I can't seem to make it stay.

Pre-Chorus:
I take a step, then fall apart,
Can't find the strength to play the part.
I close my eyes, but I can see,
The person that I'm meant to be.

Chorus:
Cover girl, put the bass in your walk,
Head to toe, let your whole body talk.
Cover girl, put your face in the place,
Beat your mug, let's show the world your face.

Bridge:
My heart is racing, and I'm all alone,
But I won't give up, won't take the throne.
I'll strut my stuff and I'll take control,
I'll let the world know, who's on a roll!

Chorus:
Cover girl, put the bass in your walk,
Head to toe, let your whole body talk.
Cover girl, put your face in the place,
Beat your mug, let's show the world your face.
write lyrics to RuPaul - Catwalk but in Serbian

Strofa 1:
Svetlo bljesne, a ja iz centra izlazim
U mojim venama adrenalin svuda se slije
Srcem pulsiraju tela, neka svako vidi
Jer sada sam kraljica, sa staza ne silazim

Refren:
Hodaj, hodaj, kao da hodaš po užetu
Hodaj, hodaj, pod stadionom oseti ritam
Hodaj, hodaj, svoj sjaj primeti
Hodaj, hodaj, sve dok se ne zaseniš

Strofa 2:
Cipele mogu biti visoke ili niske
Ali kad je uživo, svi se ustežu i čekaju
Vaš pogled na mene, to ne umanjuje moje blistavilo
Prepuštam vaše oči na moju senzualnu pokretljivost

Refren:
Hodaj, hodaj, kao da hodaš po užetu
Hodaj, hodaj, pod stadionom oseti ritam
Hodaj, hodaj, svoj sjaj primeti
Hodaj, hodaj, sve dok se ne zaseniš

Most:
Osećaj da živite san, samo napred
Neka svako vidi da zračite verom
Slobodan si, samo se odvaži, samo se odvaži

Refren:
Hodaj, hodaj, kao da hodaš po užetu
Hodaj, hodaj, pod stadionom oseti ritam
Hodaj, hodaj, svoj sjaj primeti
Hodaj, hodaj, sve dok se ne zaseniš

rewrite lyrics "Everywhere you go, everybody knows,
You're somebody, the way you work that body" in serbian in cyrillic

"Gde god da ideš, svi znaju,
Ti si neko, način na koji mrdaš telom"

rewrite lyrics “Everywhere you go, everybody knows,
You’re somebody, the way you work that body” in serbian in cyrillic alphabet, and make them match the rhythm

"Где год да идеш, сви знају,
Ти си неко, начин на који мрдаш телом"
